title: sorocea duckei
intro: Sorocea duckei, also known as the duckei sorocea or duckei sorocea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae, native to South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The leaves and bark of Sorocea duckei are used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving coughs and colds. Additionally, Sorocea duckei is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and to support immune function.
